title: 6 Pack Heat Resistant Silicone Pot Handle Covers - Universal Fit for Pots, Pans, and Skillets - Non-Slip Grip, Protects Hands from Hot Handles
description:
About this item
silicone
Heat Insulated: Our silicone pot handle covers are heat resistant up to 482℉/250℃, providing ultimate protection when handling hot or freezing pans. Enjoy your delicious meals without worrying about burns or discomfort
Comfortable & Durable: Made of premium, thick silicone material, our pot handle covers offer a comfortable grip and are built to last. They are flexible and easily fit various handle sizes, ensuring a secure hold
Cooling Arc Design: The pot grip handle sleeves feature a curved shape and thermorytic holes, allowing for a firm and non-slip installation. They also promote quick heat dissipation, ensuring your hands stay cool and safe
Versatile Kitchen Helper: Our pot handle covers are compatible with a wide range of cookware, including cast iron skillets, frying pans, metal pots, aluminum pans, and more. They are a must-have accessory for every kitchen
Convenient Package: Each package includes 6 silicone handle covers, sized at 3*0.8'' (7.5*2cm) each. The compact size makes them easy to store in a drawer, bringing quality and safety to your daily cooking routines
› See more product details
reviews_5s: So glad to find these quick slip ons for the side handles of my large stainless pots. They are great on side handles that curve around the pot, but don't work as well for lid handles, because if you put them on the way the lid curves, the opening is on the bottom, and they slip off the lid. They really protect you from getting burned.They stay in the pot handles and make it easy to handle. Love them!!The handles on her pots get SUPER hot and she was always burning her fingers. Got these for her bday and she loves them!Product arrived on time and as described. Fit pot handles very well.
reviews_1s: This wont fit a quality pot with heavy handles, and forget rounded handles.About 3 minutes into boiling water I touched the handle and immediately felt my fingers burning. Horrible product.These covers do not stay on the pot handles or the lid handle.I guess it’s my fault really! I thought maybe pot handles were universal I guess when I ordered! So make sure you measure your handles to make sure they will fit!Very cheaply made. I will not be using these.They did not fit on my pan lids. Hard to get on and would not stay onMy pot handles get really hot and I was hoping these would work but they didn’tCannot use these for even the smallest saucepan handles.Do not purchase, they melted!
